data.body:
[operator-attested] CI (GitHub Actions reconcile-bridge) signing confirmed (2026-07-16T22:43:57Z).
- Secret: REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY re-set on navapbc/rebar from AWS SSM /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key (whose public half is registered on identity 594c; verified locally by ssh-keygen -y match in 79da). gh secret list timestamp: 2026-07-16T22:24:07Z. Rollback: SSM is the source of truth (ADR-0012), unchanged; re-run gh secret set from the same param.
- Proof of a signed, verified CI-authored event: reconcile-bridge run 29537136608 wrote EDIT event 8b72ddf6-6942-4feb-b232-cbbb32fb3e06 on ticket 79da-c7e4-8d7c-471d, authored by identity 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d, with author_sig present. It VERIFIES: it is absent from 'rebar verify-identity --all --format json' (verified events are excluded from the non-verified report), i.e. its signature checks out against 594c's keyring. So the CI signing wiring (materialize key -> REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY -> rebar reconcile) produces signed, verified bot events.
- AC1 (secret set from SSM), AC2 (a CI run produces a signed verified bot event: 8b72ddf6), AC3 (operator-attested, recorded here) all satisfied.
